news.title:
Fino Payments Bank's Chief Compliance Officer, Aashish Pathak, resigns citing personal reasons.
Pathak's resignation was tendered on March 13, 2026, with his last working date set for March 31, 2026.
news.summary:
Fino Payments Bank's Chief Compliance Officer, Aashish Pathak, resigns citing personal reasons.
Pathak's resignation was tendered on March 13, 2026, with his last working date set for March 31, 2026.

news.title:
Fino Payments Bank faces a crisis as CEO Rishi Gupta's arrest for alleged GST evasion impacts stock, plunging it to an all-time low of ₹112.1.
Leadership uncertainty clouds Fino's SFB ambitions, exposing reliance on third-party managers and raising concerns over governance and compliance.
news.summary:
Fino Payments Bank faces a crisis as CEO Rishi Gupta's arrest for alleged GST evasion impacts stock, plunging it to an all-time low of ₹112.1.
Leadership uncertainty clouds Fino's SFB ambitions, exposing reliance on third-party managers and raising concerns over governance and compliance.

news.title:
Fino PB withdraws proposal for CEO Rishi Gupta's reappointment.
The move cited adherence to due process and corporate governance standards.
news.summary:
Fino PB withdraws proposal for CEO Rishi Gupta's reappointment.
The move cited adherence to due process and corporate governance standards.

news.title:
Nifty finds resistance at 23,500; key support at 23,000 amid cautious trading.
Stocks in focus include RIL, Infosys, Fino, Azad Engineering, and oil sensitives.
news.summary:
Nifty finds resistance at 23,500; key support at 23,000 amid cautious trading.
Stocks in focus include RIL, Infosys, Fino, Azad Engineering, and oil sensitives.

news.title:
Fino Payments Bank surged 10% to Rs 122.75 amid FY26 referral disbursement nearing Rs 1,300 crore.
Strong referral lending momentum observed via the bank's merchant channel.
news.summary:
Fino Payments Bank surged 10% to Rs 122.75 amid FY26 referral disbursement nearing Rs 1,300 crore.
Strong referral lending momentum observed via the bank's merchant channel.

news.title:
Fino Payments Bank sees strong Q4 FY26 referral loan growth, targeting 90% of ₹700 crore.
Management aims to achieve ₹1,300 crore in overall loan disbursements by FY26 end.
news.summary:
Fino Payments Bank sees strong Q4 FY26 referral loan growth, targeting 90% of ₹700 crore.
Management aims to achieve ₹1,300 crore in overall loan disbursements by FY26 end.

news.title:
Telangana HC dismisses Fino Payments Bank CEO's petition against arrest.
Bank states operations remain stable and plans further legal remedies.
news.summary:
Telangana HC dismisses Fino Payments Bank CEO's petition against arrest.
Bank states operations remain stable and plans further legal remedies.

news.title: Fino Payments Bank Q4 referral loan disbursements hit ₹5.4B as of Mar 20, 2026.
news.summary: Fino Payments Bank Q4 referral loan disbursements hit ₹5.4B as of Mar 20, 2026.

news.title:
Telangana HC dismissed Fino Payments Bank MD's writ petition; bail application pending.
Fino Payments Bank reported highest-ever deposits of ₹2,900 Cr this month.
news.summary:
Telangana HC dismissed Fino Payments Bank MD's writ petition; bail application pending.
Fino Payments Bank reported highest-ever deposits of ₹2,900 Cr this month.

news.title:
HDFC Bank, L&T, and Fino Payments led Tuesday's market movers with significant action.
Indian indices rose sharply, driven by gains in banks, auto, and IT sectors.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank, L&T, and Fino Payments led Tuesday's market movers with significant action.
Indian indices rose sharply, driven by gains in banks, auto, and IT sectors.

news.title:
Fino Payments Bank plunged 19% intraday, hitting a record low of ₹113.55 on heavy trading volumes.
ICRA placed Fino on Watch with Developing Implications after CEO's arrest; bank denies gaming, tax evasion involvement.
news.summary:
Fino Payments Bank plunged 19% intraday, hitting a record low of ₹113.55 on heavy trading volumes.
ICRA placed Fino on Watch with Developing Implications after CEO's arrest; bank denies gaming, tax evasion involvement.

news.title:
Fino Payments Bank Ltd to meet Envision Capital for one-on-one investor/analyst meet on Mar 20, 2026.
Meeting to take place at BKC, Mumbai; only public domain info to be discussed.
news.summary:
Fino Payments Bank Ltd to meet Envision Capital for one-on-one investor/analyst meet on Mar 20, 2026.

news.title:
RBI may ask Fino Payments Bank CEO Rishi Gupta to resign if found guilty.
IBA raised concerns with the Finance Ministry over Gupta's arrest.
news.summary:
RBI may ask Fino Payments Bank CEO Rishi Gupta to resign if found guilty.
IBA raised concerns with the Finance Ministry over Gupta's arrest.

news.title:
RBI approves Fino Payments Bank's transition to Small Finance Bank by Dec 2025.
This move marks a significant milestone for Fino Payments Bank.
news.summary:
RBI approves Fino Payments Bank's transition to Small Finance Bank by Dec 2025.
This move marks a significant milestone for Fino Payments Bank.

news.title:
Fino Payments Bank CEO's arrest won't impact its banking license, per government sources.
Indian Bankers Association has reached out to the Finance Ministry over the matter.
news.summary:
Fino Payments Bank CEO's arrest won't impact its banking license, per government sources.
Indian Bankers Association has reached out to the Finance Ministry over the matter.

news.title:
Fino Payments Bank may face an ED probe after GST Intelligence detected suspected irregularities.
The probe recommendation is linked to gaming transactions involving the bank.
news.summary:
Fino Payments Bank may face an ED probe after GST Intelligence detected suspected irregularities.
The probe recommendation is linked to gaming transactions involving the bank.

news.title:
Fino Payments Bank shares hit 52-week low, falling 15.6% amid ED probe reports.
Bank clarifies GST evasion probe involves programme managers; core operations unaffected.
news.summary:
Fino Payments Bank shares hit 52-week low, falling 15.6% amid ED probe reports.
Bank clarifies GST evasion probe involves programme managers; core operations unaffected.

news.title:
Fino Payments Bank denies PMLA probe, stating investigation is under DGGI for partner-related GST issues.
Court bail rejection claims are incorrect; bank not involved in gaming or betting activities.
news.summary:
Fino Payments Bank denies PMLA probe, stating investigation is under DGGI for partner-related GST issues.
Court bail rejection claims are incorrect; bank not involved in gaming or betting activities.

news.title: Fino Payments Bank shares fell nearly 6% despite a 9% rise in deposits.
news.summary: Fino Payments Bank shares fell nearly 6% despite a 9% rise in deposits.

news.title:
Fino Payments Bank's total deposits reached Rs 2,900 cr, growing 9% in two weeks.
1.5 lakh new accounts opened since Feb 27, averaging 10,000 per day.
news.summary:
Fino Payments Bank's total deposits reached Rs 2,900 cr, growing 9% in two weeks.
1.5 lakh new accounts opened since Feb 27, averaging 10,000 per day.
